title: Toprose - Bug Killer 1L ready to use - Fast-Acting Protection for Stronger, Healthier Blooms - Plant Protection, Rose Care, Garden Care, Ready to Use Insecticide, Rose and Shrub, Aphid Control
features: Kills and protects against the most common rose insect pests
Fast acting, just point and spray
Up to 2 weeks control of pests
Suitable for all roses in and around the garden
Kills greenfly, blackfly, caterpillars, beetles, whitefly and many more
description: From the manufacturer TOTAL ROSE CARE Toprose Bug Killer is the convenient, ready to use bug killer that gives fast-acting, effective control of common insect pests that may attack your roses. Teamed with Toprose Rose & Shrub Food, it provides full care solution for rose growers! TARGETED RESULTS Suitable for use on all rose types in and around the garden, greenhouse, conservatory, and home, it effectively kills greenfly, blackfly, caterpillars, beetles, whitefly and more. EFFECTIVE CONTROL Protects from pests for up to 2 weeks, offering you piece of mind that your roses are safe from further attack.
